meta.title: Pat Kennedy on Founding, Growing and Selling OSIsoft
meta.description:
This is another episode with the founders of great ICS companies. Dr. J. Patrick Kennedy founded OSIsoft in 1980 and grew it to dominate the historian / data broker segment of the ICS market. OSIsoft was sold in 2021 to AVEVA for $5B. In this show we talk about:

1:55 The starting and first decade of OSIsoft

18:24 OSIsoft's motivation to focus on security before most other companies

35:20 The acquisition decision and future
